name: Camp Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water to a boil in a large pot.
2. In a smaller pot, cook the meat and add the sauce mix, water, and tomato paste according to the instructions on the sauce package.
3. Cook the pasta in the boiling water for 8-10 minutes until al dente.
4. Place the lid on the pot and use potholders or gloves to carefully drain the hot pasta into a colander set over the sink.
5. Mix the sauce with the drained pasta and serve. Grated cheese may be added if desired.
Pasta notes: Spaghetti is the traditional pasta, but wheels or other compact forms will be easier to handle when draining.
